film.title: Ishq Click
film.overview: A woman from Mumbai, aided by a photographer, struggles to achieve her goal of becoming a supermodel.

dialogues.dialogue: It's because...you have finally come to India. After completing your MBA. You're very shameless. You didn't introduce any of your girlfriends to me. - Oh. - I'm sorry.
'On being asked about the truth Aditya got furious over media.' 'And misbehaved with them.' 'Aditya has become just another example of shamelessness.' Where are you going Ira? I am talking to you.

That's it. You will be, Adi. And you'll see...one day I will also stand on that stage and say very proudly...I'm the better half...of Mr. Aditya Vardhan. There's someone... who's happier than me. Maybe, she wants to say something.
If you gave me time...then I would never get addicted to alcohol. Adi. Son, I am very proud of you. You did a great job. Adi!
